buildCommand: echo '=== CWD ===' && pwd && echo '=== node_modules tailwindcss ===' && ls /vercel/path0/node_modules/tailwindcss 2>&1 | head -3 && echo '=== recharts ===' && ls /vercel/path0/node_modules/recharts 2>&1 | head -3 && echo '=== apps/web node_modules ===' && ls /vercel/path0/apps/web/node_modules 2>&1 | head -5 && node -e "try{console.log('TW:',require.resolve('tailwindcss',{paths:['/vercel/path0/apps/web']}))}catch(e){console.log('TW fail:',e.message)}" && npm run build -w @orion/web
